description_long: This handbag features a playful and eye-catching design with a plush, pink and white animal face—resembling a mouse or bear—attached to the front. The main body of the bag is made from a fabric with a red and white tie-dye pattern, while the back is a solid muted pink. A matching wrist strap, also tie-dyed, is attached to one side for easy carrying. The bag is closed with a zipper that runs along the top edge, providing secure storage for personal items. The overall shape is rectangular with a flat base, and the plush face adds a three-dimensional, whimsical element to the otherwise simple silhouette.
description: A rectangular pink and white tie-dye handbag with a plush animal face on the front, a wrist strap, and a top zipper closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plush animal face, red and white tie-dye pattern, and attached wrist strap.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and the protruding plush face element.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a solid muted pink fabric with no decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slimness and the plush face's three-dimensionality.
attribute_brand_logo: A small rectangular black and white tag is attached near the zipper on the front right side, possibly indicating a brand, but the logo details are not clearly visible.
attribute_strap_type: Single short wrist strap, non-adjustable, attached to one side of the zipper.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure running along the top edge of the bag.
attribute_decorative_elements: A plush pink and white animal face with embroidered eyes and nose is attached to the front.
attribute_pattern: Red and white tie-dye pattern on the front and strap; solid muted pink on the back.
